free_text: Isotopic effect in energy spectra of pions produced
by 660 MeV protons on nickel and tin isotopes.
Part-Det are included. Reaction lines are corrected.
Correction in Reaction lines in subents 002-013 SF3:X,
SF4-1-PP-0 or 1-PN-O was made, according N.Otsuka
Ni-58,Ni-64,Sn-112 and Sn-124 were used as targets.
Positive pions have been detected by mu-e-decay.
Negative  pions  have  been  detected by capture stars.
needed correction on negative pions capture without
The analysis of data uncertainties is not given.
